data.title: OAuth 2.0 Authentication
data.description: Employs OAuth 2.0 protocol for secure user authentication.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
data.description: Offers 2FA to provide an additional layer of security for user accounts.

data.title: Automated Threat Detection
data.description: Uses automated systems to monitor and detect vulnerabilities and threats.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning algorithms for real-time threat analysis.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Implements encryption protocols to secure user data during transmission and at rest.
data.technical_spec: Uses TLS 1.2/1.3 for transmission; AES-256 encryption for data storage.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular security audits to identify and address potential vulnerabilities.
